sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Leitung i nuntakna, siatna tawh kidim,
Nek leh dawn haksa, sum zonna zong haksa,
Siatna a tam man in, inn kuan kilem nawnlo,
Tua innkuan sung zong , gawt mun neu khat a hi.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Vangam malep, Oh! Vangam ma lep,
Vangam malep lei ah zong kiciam khol thei, Zeisu nei kim in,
Pasian zahtak ciat leng, Vangam malep, innkuan sung nuam pen.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Innkuan sung lutang in, Pate hi a,
Pate siam manin, innkuan sung nuam ding hi,
Zite’n pasal thu mang leng, tate’n zong thumang ding
Tua innkuan sung zong Topa’n makaih ding hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Innkuan sung nuam pan in, hong khang khia mite,
A heina peuh ah maitai tak in om thei,
Pasian in thupha pia, Pasian in ompih hi,
Tua innkuan sung zong, vangam neu khat a hi.
